meta.productTitle: Echo Dot (5th Gen) Smart Speaker with Alexa

reviews.author: John S.
reviews.body: Absolutely love this speaker! The sound quality is amazing and Alexa responds instantly. Best purchase I've made this year. Worth every penny!
reviews.dateRaw: Reviewed in the United States on July 2, 2024

reviews.author: Jane D.
reviews.body: Terrible product. Stopped working after two weeks. Customer service was no help. Worst speaker I ever bought. Total waste of money. Avoid at all costs.
reviews.dateRaw: Reviewed in the United States on July 2, 2024

reviews.author: Mike R.
reviews.body: Great product great value great sound great alexa great everything would buy again highly recommend to everyone best speaker ever made absolutely perfect
reviews.dateRaw: Reviewed in the United States on July 2, 2024
reviews._suspicion: BURST: Same date as 4 other 5-star reviews; SHORT_GENERIC_TEXT

reviews.author: Sarah K.
reviews.body: Great product great value great sound great alexa great everything would buy again highly recommend to everyone best speaker ever made absolutely perfect
reviews.dateRaw: Reviewed in the United States on July 2, 2024
reviews._suspicion: DUPLICATE: Identical body to rev_c3d4e5f6; BURST: Same date cluster

reviews.author: Tom L.
reviews.body: Decent speaker for the price. Setup was easy. Alexa sometimes mishears commands. Bass could be better. Overall satisfied with the purchase.
reviews.dateRaw: Reviewed in the United States on June 20, 2024

reviews.author: Emily W.
reviews.body: I've had this for 3 months now and it's been reliable. Good for smart home control. The sound doesn't match a dedicated speaker but for the price it's fine.
reviews.dateRaw: Reviewed in the United States on June 1, 2024

reviews.author: John S.
reviews.body: Update to my previous review — it stopped connecting to WiFi after the firmware update. Very disappointed. Amazon support sent a replacement.
reviews.dateRaw: Reviewed in the United States on July 11, 2024
reviews._suspicion: REVIEWER_PATTERN: John S. left 2 reviews for the same product
